The rental data for Miami shows mean prices at $2,150. Median prices stand at $1,980. Standard deviation reveals price spread of $620.  
* * *  
Outliers in rental prices appear in luxury condos. Single family homes show fewer outliers noted. Condos have higher price variability noted.  
* * *  
Matplotlib plots display price distribution clearly. Median lines highlight central trends well. Outliers stand out in condo segments.
